prose:
Method-provenance block
Property: Frontier orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV)
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting; identical to chemkit tier "standard"), RKS as implemented in PySCF  (version reported by backend)
Geometry provenance: single-point on the fixed input geometry supplied by the user (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz); no geometry optimization requested (notation: DFT//input xyz).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge and multiplicity: 0 (neutral), 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: chemkit front-end with PySCF backend.
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported by the engine. Integrity check status: ok, trustworthy = true.
Live log & artefacts: the calculation streamed to the usual chemkit live log (.out) in the scratch directory alongside the result JSON (aniline_frontier_b3lyp.json); the exact command executed is recorded in the JSON’s "cli_invocation" field and reproduced below for reproducibility.
Command: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpla7xly5m/live.json

Computed frontier-orbital energies (eV):
  • HOMO-2  = –8.4041702 eV
  • HOMO-1  = –6.8461949 eV
  • HOMO    = –5.553772 eV
  • LUMO    = –0.2489544 eV
  • LUMO+1  =  0.30750756 eV
  • LUMO+2  =  0.77617648 eV

Headline result
HOMO–LUMO gap (Δε_HL): 5.3048177 eV

No warnings were reported by the engine.
